title: PD-L1 Binder Design Public Fast Path

system.evidence_posture: public accession metadata plus synthetic candidate-jury fixture
system.heavy_artifact_policy: no generated structure files, weights, provider logs, or raw data in git

target.label: PD-L1 target window
target.notes: Public protein-protein interface benchmark; coordinate materialization belongs in runtime or ignored local cache.

lanes.purpose: Define public target window, hotspot evidence, and input audit.
Run a tiny hotspot-conditioned binder-generation tranche before wider spend.
Cofold generated candidates and rank with confidence and failure rows preserved.
Render candidate jury and report with explicit non-claims.

operator_gates: current tool license and use-context review before GPU execution
explicit budget and cleanup policy before paid provider launch
public-only MSA/service use unless operator supplies approved private data route
